meta.purpose: The join the council caught was missing. counter_kb speaks 'mechanism' (how you beat enemy hero X); comp_gap_model speaks 'function' (what role your comp needs). This file maps between the two closed vocabularies so the engine's counter mode and comp-gap mode can be scored on one objective (D-009).
meta.direction: mechanism_to_function is authoritative. function_to_mechanism is the derived inverse (regenerated from it; do not hand-edit).
meta.usage_counter_mode: When the enemy comp needs mechanism M to be answered, a candidate pick that provides M also CREDITS the comp-functions M maps to. Lets a single pick close a counter-threat AND a comp gap (the D-009 'covers multiple gaps' bonus).
meta.usage_comp_mode: When comp-gap mode finds function F uncovered, function_to_mechanism[F] tells the engine which provides_mechanisms (registry/counter_kb 0.7) actually deliver F.
meta.vocab_source: data/registry.json — mechanism_vocab (24) and function_vocab (10). Every key here MUST exist there; zod validates zero unknown tokens. A mechanism may map to 0..n functions (some are pure matchup mechanics with no standing comp-function, e.g. mark / cooldown_force).
meta.compliance: No ban vocab. No enemy stats. Pure taxonomy.

unmapped_mechanisms_note.comment: These mechanisms are pure matchup tactics with no standing comp-FUNCTION (they don't define a comp role; they're per-duel tools). They still credit COUNTER coverage, just not comp-gap coverage. Kept explicit so a future reader doesn't think they were forgotten.
unmapped_mechanisms_note.mark: Pre-dive focus-fire marker (Hulk/Thor/Angela). A tactic, not a comp role.
unmapped_mechanisms_note.clone_pressure: Loki-mirror cooldown pressure. Single-edge matchup tool.
unmapped_mechanisms_note.prolonged_hitbox: Star-Lord big-hitbox exploit (Emma). One-off matchup quirk.
